title: euphorbia × paradoxa nothovar. podolica
intro: Euphorbia × paradoxa nothovar. podolica, also known as the Spur Geranium or Wolf's Bane, is a nothovar of the Euphorbia paradoxa plant, primarily found in Eastern Europe and the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. The plant is also believed to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Euphorbia × paradoxa nothovar. podolica can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
